body.p: By using the auto-negotiation protocol, you have optimal performance of data transfer over the Ethernet.

Auto-negotiation is a feature of the IEEE 802.3u Fast Ethernet protocol. It targets the device ports to provide an optimal performance of speed, duplex mode, and flow control for information exchange over a link.

note.p: To utilize maximum performance of auto-negotiation, use the same configuration on both sides of a link.
